Galaxy rank — Power 0
A 30-day training saga

Road to #1

A long time ago, in a body that wanted to get stronger… You are George Lucas, director of your own saga. Finish each day's training and you write the next scene — and a legend joins your cast, each one stronger than the last.

How the saga works

Simple rules. The Force rewards consistency and punishes the days you let slip.

✅

Finish the day, log it

Tick all 9 moves, then log the day. That's one scene written.

＋8

Gain power

Every logged day adds 8 power and unlocks the next legend in line.

−5

Skip a day, lose ground

Miss a full day and the dark side creeps in — 5 power gone.

★

Climb to #1

30 days, 30 legends. Rise from unknown to the most powerful in the galaxy.

Your cast unlocks from least to most powerful — Day 1 is a scrappy hero, Day 30 is a force of nature. As they grow stronger, so do you. Head to Train to write today's scene.

Today's routine — First Interval

This is your beginner set. You can rename moves, adjust the reps, add or remove anything in the Train tab.

Day 1 of 30

Finish all 9 moves to unlock your next legend.

Tip: edits save automatically.

The cast — 30 legends

Unlocked in order of growing power. Train to bring each one into your saga.

Your standing

Every scene you write moves you up the galaxy.

The 30-day saga

Gold means logged, red means a day slipped past, and the blue ring is today. Tap a gold day to see exactly what you trained.

Training log

Every logged day, with the exact moves and their time / reps — kept as they were on the day, so renaming or bumping up your routine later never rewrites history.

Climb to the top of the galaxy

Power earns rank. Reach the summit to be named the most powerful in the galaxy.

Cross-device sync

Sign in to keep your saga in step across your phone, tablet and computer.

EPISODE I — THE DISCIPLINE

A new director takes the chair. Thirty days of training stretch ahead, and with them, thirty legends waiting to be brought to the screen.

Each day completed writes another scene and gains another ally. Each day abandoned lets the dark side gather strength.

The galaxy is watching to see who will rise to number one…

Take the director's chair

You are George Lucas. What name should roll in the credits?
